---
title: "test patients only"
output:
  workflowr::wflow_html:
    code_folding: hide
    toc: true
date: "2025-10-10"
---





```{r, echo=F, message=F, warning=F, results=F}
library(rprojroot)
root <- rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file()
source(file.path(root, "analysis/Rfunctions.R"))
root <- rprojroot::find_rstudio_root_file()
```






```{r, message=F, warning=F}
 
load(file.path(root, "../2025/202510/Rady/all_sheets.RData"))
data=all_sheets$Data
variable_codes=all_sheets$`Coding `
backup=all_sheets$`Combined 9-30-2025 backup`

```



## home 

[home](2025_1001_Rady.html)



## continuous variables 

```{r, message=F, warning=F}
data=data %>% filter (Group=="Test")  # test patients only 


continuous_var=c("Age", "MDAS_SUM", "OHIP_D2_SUM", "OHIP_D5_SUM", "OHIP_D7_SUM", "OHIP_D2_SUM", "OHIP_preop_SUM", 
                 "Fear_Pain_Sum", "Pain_catastrophizing_Sum", "Literacy_Sum", "VAS_pain_preop", "VAS_Pain_H1", 
                 "VAS_Pain_H2", "VAS_Pain_H3", paste0("VAS_Pain_D", seq(1,7)), 
                 "VAS_swell_preop", "VAS_Swelling_H1", "VAS_Swelling_H2", "VAS_Swelling_H3", paste0("VAS_Swelling_D", seq(1,7)),                  "Acetaminophen_H1", "Acetaminophen_H2", "Acetaminophen_H3", paste0("Acetaminophen_D", seq(1,7)), 
                 "VAS_pain_during_Procedure_D1", "VAS_pain_during_Procedure_D7", 
                 "VAS_pain_anticipated_preop", "Anticipated_Pain_Compared_to_Actual_Pain_D1", 
                 "Anticipated_Pain_Compared_to_Actual_Pain_D7", "Willingness_to_repeat_procedure_D1", 
                 "Willingness_to_repeat_procedure_D7", "VAS_swell_anticipated_preop")
data_continuous=data %>% select(continuous_var)
summary_statistics(data_continuous) %>%
datatable(extensions = 'Buttons',
          caption = "", 
            options = list(dom = 'Blfrtip',
                           buttons = c('copy', 'csv', 'excel', 'pdf', 'print'),
                           lengthMenu = list(c(10,25,50,-1),
                                             c(10,25,50,"All"))))
```



```{r, message=F, warning=F}

# Step 1. Convert all columns to numeric (if possible)
data_num <- data_continuous

# Convert factors or characters to numeric safely
data_num <- data.frame(lapply(data_num, function(x) {
  if (is.factor(x) || is.character(x)) {
    as.numeric(as.character(x))
  } else {
    x
  }
}))

# Step 2. Compute Spearman correlation (ignoring NAs)
cor_mat <- cor(data_num, method = "spearman", use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

# Step 3. Compute p-values
n <- ncol(data_num)
p_mat <- matrix(NA, n, n)
colnames(p_mat) <- colnames(data_num)
rownames(p_mat) <- colnames(data_num)

for (i in 1:n) {
  for (j in 1:n) {
    if (i != j) {
      test <- suppressWarnings(cor.test(
        data_num[[i]], 
        data_num[[j]], 
        method = "spearman", 
        exact = FALSE
      ))
      p_mat[i, j] <- test$p.value
    } else {
      p_mat[i, j] <- NA
    }
  }
}

# Step 4. Tidy results (optional)
library(reshape2)
cor_df <- melt(cor_mat, varnames = c("Var1", "Var2"), value.name = "Spearman_r")
p_df <- melt(p_mat, varnames = c("Var1", "Var2"), value.name = "p_value")

results <- merge(cor_df, p_df, by = c("Var1", "Var2"))
results <- results[results$Var1 != results$Var2, ]

results$Spearman_r=round(results$Spearman_r,4)
results$p_value=pvalue_adjust(results$p_value)

results  %>%
datatable(extensions = 'Buttons',
          caption = "", 
            options = list(dom = 'Blfrtip',
                           buttons = c('copy', 'csv', 'excel', 'pdf', 'print'),
                           lengthMenu = list(c(10,25,50,-1),
                                             c(10,25,50,"All"))))

```



## categorical variables


```{r, message=F, warning=F}
prop.test(c(sum(data$Gender==1), sum(data$Gender==2)), n=c(length(data$Gender), length(data$Gender)))

```

* no difference 





```{r, message=F, warning=F}

# 1. Define the labels for clarity
labels <- c("1" = "Less than anticipated", 
            "2" = "Similar to anticipated", 
            "3" = "More than anticipated")

report_pain_comparison <- function(vec, day_label) {
  # 1. Create frequency table
  counts <- table(factor(vec, levels = c(1, 2, 3)))
  probs  <- prop.table(counts) * 100
  
  # 2. Combine into the main frequency table
  df_table <- data.frame(
    Response = labels,
    Count = as.vector(counts),
    Percentage = paste0(round(as.vector(probs), 1), "%")
  )
  
  # 3. Perform Pairwise Comparisons (Post-hoc Binomial Tests)
  # Define the pairs to compare: (1 vs 2), (1 vs 3), (2 vs 3)
  pairs <- list(c(1, 2), c(1, 3), c(2, 3))
  pairwise_results <- data.frame()
  
  for(p in pairs) {
    idx1 <- p[1]
    idx2 <- p[2]
    
    # Perform Exact Binomial Test on the two counts
    # It tests if the distribution between the two is significantly different from 50/50
    test <- binom.test(x = c(as.vector(counts)[idx1], as.vector(counts)[idx2]))
    
    pairwise_results <- rbind(pairwise_results, data.frame(
      Comparison = paste(labels[idx1], "vs", labels[idx2]),
      p_value = pvalue_adjust(test$p.value)
    ))
  }
  
  # 4. Adjust p-values for multiple testing (Bonferroni correction)
  pairwise_results$p_adj <-p.adjust(pairwise_results$p_value, method = "bonferroni")
  
  # 5. Add a significance "Star" column for easy reading
  pairwise_results$Significance <- ifelse(pairwise_results$p_adj < 0.05, "*", "ns")
  
  return(list(
    table = df_table, 
    pairwise = pairwise_results
  ))
}

results_d1 <- report_pain_comparison(data$Anticipated_Pain_Compared_to_Actual_Pain_D1, "Day 1")
results_d7 <- report_pain_comparison(data$Anticipated_Pain_Compared_to_Actual_Pain_D7, "Day 7")

results_d1$table%>%
datatable(extensions = 'Buttons',
          caption = "Anticipated_Pain_Compared_to_Actual_Pain_D1", 
            options = list(dom = 'Blfrtip',
                           buttons = c('copy', 'csv', 'excel', 'pdf', 'print'),
                           lengthMenu = list(c(10,25,50,-1),
                                             c(10,25,50,"All"))))

results_d1$pairwise%>%
datatable(extensions = 'Buttons',
          caption = "Anticipated_Pain_Compared_to_Actual_Pain_D1", 
            options = list(dom = 'Blfrtip',
                           buttons = c('copy', 'csv', 'excel', 'pdf', 'print'),
                           lengthMenu = list(c(10,25,50,-1),
                                             c(10,25,50,"All"))))

results_d7$table%>%
datatable(extensions = 'Buttons',
          caption = "Anticipated_Pain_Compared_to_Actual_Pain_D7", 
            options = list(dom = 'Blfrtip',
                           buttons = c('copy', 'csv', 'excel', 'pdf', 'print'),
                           lengthMenu = list(c(10,25,50,-1),
                                             c(10,25,50,"All"))))

results_d7$pairwise%>%
datatable(extensions = 'Buttons',
          caption = "Anticipated_Pain_Compared_to_Actual_Pain_D7", 
            options = list(dom = 'Blfrtip',
                           buttons = c('copy', 'csv', 'excel', 'pdf', 'print'),
                           lengthMenu = list(c(10,25,50,-1),
                                             c(10,25,50,"All"))))

```
